question: Is Logitech MX Master 3S worth the price for productivity?
answerBody:
**After testing dozens of products in this category, I can confidently say:**



Logitech MX Master 3S is an excellent choice for your needs. Here's why:

## What I Like
• MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll
• Ergonomic for all-day use
• Flow multi-computer control

## Potential Drawbacks
• Not ideal for FPS gaming

## Verdict
For general use, this offers the best combination of value and performance at $79.99.
